content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.multi_voice
FILE: cosmos/integration/multi_voice.py (1377 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Multi-Voice System - Distinct Voices for Each Swarm Member

"We are many. We sound like many. Each voice is unique."

This module provides distinct text-to-speech voices for each bot in the swarm,
enabling them to speak sequentially with their own personality.

PRIMARY: Fish Speech (best qual

CLASSES:
- VoiceProvider(Enum): Available voice providers - ordered by quality.
- VoiceConfig: Configuration for a bot's voice.
- MultiVoiceSystem: Manages distinct voices for each swarm member.

Features:
- Fish Speech (primary
  Methods: def get_voice_config(self, bot_name: str) -> VoiceConfig
  Methods: async def generate_speech(self, text: str, bot_name: str, use_cache: bool=True) -> Optional[Path]
  Methods: async def wait_for_voice_queue(self, timeout: float=10.0) -> bool
  Methods: async def queue_speech(self, text: str, bot_name: str, priority: int=5) -> str
  Methods: async def process_queue(self) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: def get_queue_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def get_available_voices(self) -> Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def list_edge_voices(self) -> list
- SpeechQueueManager: Manages sequential speech playback across all bots.

Ensures:
1. Only one bot sp
  Methods: async def add_to_queue(self, bot_name: str, text: str, audio_url: Optional[str]=None) -> int
  Methods: async def mark_speaking(self, bot_name: str)
  Methods: async def mark_complete(self, bot_name: str)
  Methods: async def get_next_speaker(self) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def clear_queue(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_multi_voice_system() -> MultiVoiceSystem
- def get_speech_queue() -> SpeechQueueManager
